sentences.target: Vamos al centro comercial después de clase.
sentences.reading: /ˈbamos al ˈsentɾo komeɾˈsjal desˈpwes de ˈklase/

translations.es: Vamos al centro comercial después de clase.
translations.ipa: /ˈbamos al ˈsentɾo komeɾˈsjal desˈpwes de ˈklase/
translations.en: Let's go to the shopping mall after class.
translations.fr: Allons au centre commercial après les cours.
translations.de: Gehen wir nach dem Unterricht ins Einkaufszentrum.
translations.it: Andiamo al centro commerciale dopo le lezioni.
translations.yue: 我哋落堂之後去商場啦。
translations.ru: Пойдём в торговый центр после занятий.
translations.pt: Vamos ao shopping depois da aula.
translations.vi: Đi đến trung tâm thương mại sau giờ học nhé.
translations.ar: هيا نذهب إلى المركز التجاري بعد الدرس.
translations.nl: Laten we na de les naar het winkelcentrum gaan.
translations.uk: Ходімо в торговий центр після занять.
translations.hi: चलो, क्लास के बाद मॉल चलते हैं।
translations.pl: Pójdźmy po lekcjach do centrum handlowego.
translations.el: Ας πάμε στο εμπορικό κέντρο μετά το μάθημα.
translations.nb: La oss gå til kjøpesenteret etter timen.
translations.id: Ayo pergi ke mal setelah kelas.
translations.sv: Vi går till köpcentret efter lektionen.
translations.ro: Hai să mergem la mall după curs.
translations.cs: Pojďme po hodině do nákupního centra.
translations.da: Lad os gå i shoppingcenteret efter timen.
translations.ja: 授業のあとでショッピングモールに行こう。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb form; 1st person plural present indicative of 'ir', expressing motion or, pragmatically, an exhortation.
Preposition plus article contracted into one surface form; introduces the destination complement.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase 'centro comercial'.
Adjective modifying 'centro'; agrees in gender/number by default with the noun phrase and describes type/function.
Adverb of time; introduces the temporal relation with the following phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'después'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de' in a temporal expression.

sentences.target: Mi padre compra en una zona comercial.
sentences.reading: /mi ˈpaðɾe ˈkompɾa en ˈuna ˈsona komeɾˈsjal/

translations.es: Mi padre compra en una zona comercial.
translations.ipa: /mi ˈpaðɾe ˈkompɾa en ˈuna ˈsona komeɾˈsjal/
translations.en: My dad shops in a shopping area.
translations.fr: Mon père fait ses courses dans une zone commerciale.
translations.de: Mein Vater kauft in einem Geschäftsviertel ein.
translations.it: Mio padre fa acquisti in una zona commerciale.
translations.ru: Мой отец ходит за покупками в торговом районе.
translations.pt: Meu pai faz compras numa zona comercial.
translations.tr: Babam bir alışveriş bölgesinde alışveriş yapıyor.
translations.vi: Bố tôi mua sắm ở một khu thương mại.
translations.nl: Mijn vader doet boodschappen in een winkelgebied.
translations.uk: Мій тато робить покупки в торговому районі.
translations.hu: Az apám egy kereskedelmi negyedben vásárol.
translations.hi: मेरे पिताजी एक व्यापारिक इलाके में खरीदारी करते हैं।
translations.pl: Mój tata robi zakupy w strefie handlowej.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου ψωνίζει σε μια εμπορική περιοχή.
translations.id: Ayah saya berbelanja di kawasan niaga.
translations.sv: Min pappa handlar i ett affärsområde.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu face cumpărături într-o zonă comercială.
translations.cs: Můj táta nakupuje v obchodní čtvrti.
translations.da: Min far handler i et handelsområde.
translations.ja: 父は商業地区で買い物をします。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'padre'.
Common noun; subject of the verb 'compra'.
Finite verb form; 3rd person singular present indicative of 'comprar'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Indefinite article/determiner modifying 'zona'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'una zona comercial'.
Adjective modifying 'zona'; agrees with the noun and describes the kind of zone.

sentences.target: Hay una calle comercial cerca de casa.
sentences.reading: /aj ˈuna ˈkaʝe komeɾˈsjal ˈseɾka de ˈkasa/

translations.es: Hay una calle comercial cerca de casa.
translations.ipa: /aj ˈuna ˈkaʝe komeɾˈsjal ˈseɾka de ˈkasa/
translations.en: There is a shopping street near home.
translations.fr: Il y a une rue commerçante près de la maison.
translations.de: In der Nähe des Hauses gibt es eine Einkaufsstraße.
translations.it: C'è una via commerciale vicino a casa.
translations.ru: Рядом с домом есть торговая улица.
translations.pt: Há uma rua comercial perto de casa.
translations.tr: Evin yakınında bir alışveriş caddesi var.
translations.vi: Có một phố mua sắm gần nhà.
translations.ar: هناك شارع تجاري بالقرب من المنزل.
translations.nl: Er is een winkelstraat dicht bij huis.
translations.uk: Поруч із домом є торгова вулиця.
translations.hu: Van egy kereskedelmi utca a közelben.
translations.hi: घर के पास एक बाज़ार वाली सड़क है।
translations.el: Υπάρχει ένας εμπορικός δρόμος κοντά στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Det er en handlegate i nærheten av huset.
translations.sv: Det finns en shoppinggata nära hemmet.
translations.ro: Este o stradă comercială aproape de casă.
translations.cs: Nedaleko od domu je obchodní ulice.
translations.da: Der er en handelsgade i nærheden af hjemmet.
translations.ja: 家の近くに商店街があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal finite verb form; 3rd person singular present indicative of 'haber' used existentially.
Indefinite article/determiner modifying 'calle'.
Common noun; object in the existential construction headed by 'hay'.
Adjective modifying 'calle'; specifies the type of street.
Adverb expressing proximity; forms a locative expression with the following prepositional phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'cerca'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Ese anuncio comercial sale en la tele.
sentences.reading: /ˈese anˈunsjo komeɾˈsjal ˈsale en la ˈtele/

translations.es: Ese anuncio comercial sale en la tele.
translations.ipa: /ˈese anˈunsjo komeɾˈsjal ˈsale en la ˈtele/
translations.fr: Cette publicité passe à la télé.
translations.it: Quel pubblicità va in onda in TV.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个商业广告在电视上播出。
translations.yue: 嗰個商業廣告喺電視度播。
translations.vi: Quảng cáo đó đang chiếu trên TV.
translations.hu: Az a reklám megy a tévében.
translations.hi: वह विज्ञापन टीवी पर आता है।
translations.el: Αυτή η διαφήμιση παίζει στην τηλεόραση.
translations.sv: Den där reklamen går på tv.
translations.ja: そのコマーシャルがテレビで流れる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'anuncio'.
Common noun; subject of the verb 'sale'.
Adjective modifying 'anuncio'; indicates that it is an advertisement.
Finite verb form; 3rd person singular present indicative of 'salir'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, modifying 'tele'.
Common noun used colloquially for 'televisión'; object of the preposition 'en'.
